9:15 AM COURT CALLED TO ORDER. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. OPENING STATEMENTS WAIVED BY BOTH SIDES. PLAINTIFF'S WITNESS, STEVE MURARIA SWORN AND EXAMINED. EXHIBIT A, PAPER ENTITLED "ADDITIONAL SCOPE OF WORK", MARKED FOR ID AND EVIDENCE. EXHIBIT B, INSPECTION RECORD, MARKED FOR ID AND EVIDENCE. EXHIBIT C, PHOTO OF WALL HEATER, MARKED FOR ID AND EVIDENCE. DEFENSE EXHIBITS, 1-9, SHOWING DEFECTS IN REPAIR OF HOUSE, MARKED FOR ID AND EVIDENCE. 9:25 AM CROSS EXAM OF STEVE MURARIA 9:35 AM PLAINTIFF RESTS. 9:36 AM JOAQUIN SANTOS SWORN AND EXAMINED. EXHIBIT 10, LETTER SHOWING ADDITIONAL WORK NEEDED ON BUILDING, MARKED FOR ID AND EVIDENCE. 9:47 AM CROSS EXAM OF JUAN SANTOS 9:52 AM RE-DIRECT OF JUAN SANTOS 9:57 AM CIRO LOPEZ SWORN AND EXAMINED FOR DEFENSE 10:03 AM CROSS EXAMINATION OF CIRO LOPEZ 10:08 AM MARTHA SANTOS. SWORN AND EXAMINED 10:13 AM MARTHA SANTOS CROSS EXAMINATION 10:20 AM BOTH SIDES REST. CASE SUBMITTED. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO APPROPRIATE PARTIES.
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTOS, JOAQUIN $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,951.13 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,951.13
